other_observers: Mark Emmer; Nancy Vickery--original finder and identifier
description: Thick red bill, black mask, red crest, reddish tail and wings, slightly smaller than robin, more slender.Behaviors: Observed on the ground and in nearby trees. Often turned head to peer at something on the ground. Did not approach the sunflower seed feeder, though was observed eating on the ground.Call: Did not hear vocalizationPlumage: Brown with red crest and dark mask
